growth_records.medium: Sodium carbonate/bicarbonate soda mineral medium with thiosulfate

up.method: electron donor; specific rate not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Dimitry Y. Sorokin et al. The Microbial Sulfur Cycle at Extremely Haloalkaline Conditions of Soda Lakes. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00044. [PMC3128939]
growth_records.snippet: Maximal specific growth rate 0.25 h-1 ... Maximal growth yield with S2O3^2- 6.5 mg protein mmol-1 (Table 2).
growth_records.notes: Review-compiled Table 2 value. mu_max 0.25 h-1; doubling_time=ln2/0.25=2.77 h (calculated). Yield 6.5 mg protein/mmol thiosulfate (highest among the SOB genera). pH optimum 10.0-10.2 (midpoint 10.1). Upper salt limit 4.3 M Na+ (uniquely salt-tolerant aerobic chemolithoautotroph). Temperature not stated. Genus-aggregate from authors' prior work.
